title: Smoky Bazaar Cod
description: A low-calorie-friendly, smoky and juicy cod dish inspired by romantic Saudi Arabian cuisine, perfect for a light dinner or snack.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic and onion, cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Increase heat to high, add cod fillet slices. Sear on all sides until golden brown, around 2-3 minutes per side.
Sprinkle smoked paprika and red pepper flakes evenly over the top of the cod.
Drizzle lemon juice over the dish, season with salt as desired.
Transfer to a baking dish, cover loosely with foil. Bake for about 10-15 minutes or until the fish is fully cooked and flaky.
Garnish with torn basil leaves before serving.
